Launcher app and glance management for Pebble firmware, including menu layers, alarms, music, notifications, and various glance features.


## Files
- **[launcher_app.c](launcher_app.c.md)**: Implements the launcher app for Pebble firmware, managing menu layers and app focus events.
- **[launcher_app.h](launcher_app.h.md)**: Defines structures and functions for managing launcher menu arguments and draw state in the Pebble firmware.
- **[launcher_app_glance.c](launcher_app_glance.c.md)**: Functions for initializing, updating, drawing, notifying, and destroying a LauncherAppGlance object.
- **[launcher_app_glance.h](launcher_app_glance.h.md)**: Defines the `LauncherAppGlance` structure and functions for managing and rendering app glances.
- **[launcher_app_glance_alarms.c](launcher_app_glance_alarms.c.md)**: Implements alarm glance functionality for the Pebble launcher app, including icon and subtitle updates.
- **[launcher_app_glance_alarms.h](launcher_app_glance_alarms.h.md)**: Function declaration for creating a LauncherAppGlance object for alarms using an AppMenuNode.
- **[launcher_app_glance_generic.c](launcher_app_glance_generic.c.md)**: Implements a generic launcher app glance with icon and subtitle management for Pebble firmware.
- **[launcher_app_glance_generic.h](launcher_app_glance_generic.h.md)**: Creates a generic launcher app glance for a given app menu node with a fallback icon option.
- **[launcher_app_glance_music.c](launcher_app_glance_music.c.md)**: Implements a music glance feature for the Pebble launcher app, handling music state updates and icon management.
- **[launcher_app_glance_music.h](launcher_app_glance_music.h.md)**: Function declaration for creating a music glance in the launcher app.
- **[launcher_app_glance_notifications.c](launcher_app_glance_notifications.c.md)**: Implements notification glance functionality for the Pebble launcher app, handling events and updates.
- **[launcher_app_glance_notifications.h](launcher_app_glance_notifications.h.md)**: Function declaration for creating a LauncherAppGlance with glance notifications from an AppMenuNode.
- **[launcher_app_glance_private.c](launcher_app_glance_private.c.md)**: Defines a function to get the size of a custom KinoReel in the launcher app.
- **[launcher_app_glance_private.h](launcher_app_glance_private.h.md)**: Defines a function to get the size of a reel for drawing a launcher app glance.
- **[launcher_app_glance_service.c](launcher_app_glance_service.c.md)**: Manages glance services for the launcher app, including caching, timers, and event handling.
- **[launcher_app_glance_service.h](launcher_app_glance_service.h.md)**: Defines the `LauncherAppGlanceService` for managing and displaying app glances in the Pebble firmware.
- **[launcher_app_glance_settings.c](launcher_app_glance_settings.c.md)**: Manages glance settings for the launcher app, including battery, connectivity, and event handling.
- **[launcher_app_glance_settings.h](launcher_app_glance_settings.h.md)**: Function to create a LauncherAppGlance object from an AppMenuNode.
- **[launcher_app_glance_structured.c](launcher_app_glance_structured.c.md)**: Implements structured glance functionality for launcher apps, including icon and text rendering.
- **[launcher_app_glance_structured.h](launcher_app_glance_structured.h.md)**: Defines the `LauncherAppGlanceStructured` structure and related functions for managing structured app glances.
- **[launcher_app_glance_watchfaces.c](launcher_app_glance_watchfaces.c.md)**: Implements functionality for creating and managing watchface glances in the Pebble firmware.
- **[launcher_app_glance_watchfaces.h](launcher_app_glance_watchfaces.h.md)**: Function declaration for creating a LauncherAppGlance object for watchfaces using an AppMenuNode.
- **[launcher_app_glance_weather.c](launcher_app_glance_weather.c.md)**: Implements a weather glance feature for the Pebble launcher app, handling weather data display and updates.
- **[launcher_app_glance_weather.h](launcher_app_glance_weather.h.md)**: Declares a function to create a weather glance for the launcher app in Pebble firmware.
- **[launcher_app_glance_workout.c](launcher_app_glance_workout.c.md)**: Implements a workout glance feature for the Pebble launcher app, managing icons, titles, and timers.
- **[launcher_app_glance_workout.h](launcher_app_glance_workout.h.md)**: Function declaration for creating a workout glance in the launcher app.
- **[launcher_menu_layer.c](launcher_menu_layer.c.md)**: Implements a menu layer for launching apps, including rendering, selection, and glance services.
- **[launcher_menu_layer.h](launcher_menu_layer.h.md)**: Defines the LauncherMenuLayer structure and functions for managing menu layers in the Pebble firmware.
- **[launcher_menu_layer_private.h](launcher_menu_layer_private.h.md)**: Defines constants for launcher menu layer cell dimensions and visibility based on platform and display type.
